new_classes.label_en: Blended Malt Whisky in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.label_de: Blended Malt Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 30 49)
new_classes.definition_en: Blended Malt Whisky presented in containers of a nominal volume greater than 2 litres, produced by blending two or more Malt Whiskies distilled at different distilleries.

coverage_explanation: The legal note identifies three key distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 30 49: (1) the product is a 'Blended Malt' whisky, (2) it is presented in containers with a nominal volume greater than 2 litres (distinguishing it from 2208 30 41 which is ≤ 2 L), and (3) it is produced by blending two or more Malt Whiskies distilled at different distilleries. All three criteria are captured: (1) via subClassOf BlendedMaltWhisky, (2) via BFO:has_part some LargeContainer, (3) via producedBy some BlendingProcess and has_quality some MultiDistilleryOriginQuality. A disjointness complement restriction against BlendedMaltWhiskyInSmallContainer is added. Coverage is slightly reduced (0.85) because the specific Scotch whisky geographic origin aspect is modelled at the BlendedMaltScotchWhisky parent level rather than explicitly repeated here, and the minimum number of source distilleries (≥ 2) cannot be precisely expressed with the current property vocabulary without a cardinality axiom on a new property.
